raw.message: For three neurodivergent kids, Roblox isn’t a game changer. It’s a life changer.

hook.summary: A split-screen introduction of three siblings and their digital avatars.
hook.visual_action: The video shows three children in their home environment transitioning into their stylized Roblox avatars.
hook.text_overlay: When we group up we're the main characters of the story.
hook.voiceover_transcript: When we group up, we're the main characters of the story.

scene_flow: Introduction of three siblings and their corresponding Roblox avatars through a split-screen visual.
A father provides a testimonial about his children's autism diagnosis and their connection to the game.
Gameplay montage showcasing the children's avatars interacting in various social and skill-based environments.
The father explains the developmental benefits of the platform, including coordination and socialization.
Final emotional close with the father expressing pride over the Roblox logo.
on_screen_text: we're the main characters of the story.
All three of my kids have autism.
learning how to socialize, to be independent.
Seeing where they were and where they are now,
audience_proxy: Parents of neurodivergent children looking for safe and developmental social gaming platforms.
